title: renoir: A Python Tool for Analyzing Artist-Specific Works from WikiArt
description: A Python package for teaching computational color theory and data analysis to art and design students. Provides artist-specific work extraction from WikiArt with comprehensive color analysis capabilities including k-means palette extraction, multi-space color analysis (RGB/HSV/LAB), statistical metrics, color harmony detection, historical pigment availability scoring, and publication-quality visualizations. Designed specifically for art and design education with pedagogical clarity and cultural relevance.

creators.name: Semoglou, Michail
creators.affiliation: Tongji University, College of Design and Innovation; University of Ioannina, School of Fine Arts
